#### The purpose of this pyspark notebook is to read Delta tables from owb_standarsied_db to owb_harmonisied_db and load all records as Delta tables along with metadata columns.

**Author**               **Created Date**              **Description**  
Rohit Shukla         04-Mar-2025             The functionality of this notebook is to Delta Table transform_inspector_address into owb-harmonisied_db layer.

#import all libraries and initialise Spark Session
import calendar
from datetime import datetime, timedelta, date
import requests
import pyspark.sql.functions as F 
import re
from notebookutils import mssparkutils
from pyspark.sql.functions import lit, current_timestamp, to_date ,expr, md5, col, date_format,when, to_date,current_date,concat,cast,regexp_replace,coalesce,concat_ws,row_number
from pprint import pprint as pp
from pyspark.sql.types import *
from pyspark.sql.window import Window
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
spark = SparkSession.builder.getOrCreate()
from delta.tables import DeltaTable
#ignore FutureWarning messages 
import warnings
warnings.filterwarnings("ignore", message="iteritems is deprecated")

# Define delta table names, database name and table paths
source_database_name = "odw_standardised_db"
target_database_name = "odw_harmonised_db"
source_delta_table = f"{source_database_name}.inspector_addresses_weekly"
target_delta_table = f"{target_database_name}.sap_hr_inspector_address"
delta_table_path = f"abfss://odw-harmonised@{storage_account}saphr/sap_hr_inspector_address"

print(source_delta_table)
print(target_delta_table)
print(delta_table_path)

# Step 1: Read source Delta Table
#df_source_inspector_address = spark.read.format("delta").option("inferSchema", "false").table(source_delta_table)

src_spark_sql = f"""SELECT  StaffNumber,
                            StreetandHouseNumber,
                            2ndAddressLine,
                            City,
                            District,
                            PostalCode,
                            RegionStateProvinceCount AS Region,
                            TO_DATE(StartDate,'dd/MM/yyyy') AS StartDate,
                            TO_DATE('31/12/9999','dd/MM/yyyy') AS EndDate,
                            CASE 
                            WHEN LENGTH(ChartingOfficer) = 6 THEN 
                            CASE 
                            WHEN ChartingOfficer LIKE '50%' THEN CONCAT('00', ChartingOfficer)
                            WHEN ChartingOfficer LIKE '42%' THEN CONCAT('50', ChartingOfficer)
                            ELSE ChartingOfficer
                            END
                            WHEN LENGTH(ChartingOfficer) = 8 THEN ChartingOfficer
                            ELSE ChartingOfficer
                            END AS ChartingOfficer,
                            CASE 
                            WHEN ChartingOfficerforInspector ='' THEN NULL
                            ELSE ChartingOfficerforInspector
                            END AS ChartingOfficerforInspector,
                            SubsPSgroup,
                            TelNo AS Telephoneno,
                            NULL AS PersonalMobile,
                            WorkMobile,
                            MAX(TO_DATE(Chngdon,'dd/MM/yyyy')) AS Chngdon
                            FROM {source_delta_table} t1
                            WHERE TO_DATE(StartDate,'dd/MM/yyyy') = (SELECT MAX(TO_DATE(t2.StartDate,'dd/MM/yyyy'))
                                                FROM {source_delta_table} t2
                                                WHERE t2.StaffNumber = t1.StaffNumber
                                            )
                    GROUP BY	    StaffNumber,
                                    StreetandHouseNumber,
                                    2ndAddressLine,
                                    City,
                                    District,
                                    PostalCode,
                                    RegionStateProvinceCount,
                                    TO_DATE(StartDate,'dd/MM/yyyy'),
                                    TO_DATE('31/12/9999','dd/MM/yyyy'),
                                    ChartingOfficer,
                                    ChartingOfficerforInspector,
                                    SubsPSgroup,
                                    TelNo,
                                    WorkMobile"""

df_transform_inspector_address = spark.sql(src_spark_sql)

#display(df_transform_inspector_address.count())

# Add the RowID column to the DataFrame
rowid_columns = [c for c in df_transform_inspector_address.columns]

# Convert RowID columns to hash values
rowid_expr = md5(concat_ws("|", *[coalesce(col(c).cast("string"), lit("")) for c in rowid_columns]))

# Add the RowID column to the DataFrame
df_transform_inspector_address = df_transform_inspector_address.withColumn("RowID", rowid_expr)

# Removing duplicate records using row_number
dedup_spec = Window.partitionBy("StaffNumber").orderBy(TO_DATE(col("Chngdon"),'dd/MM/yyyy').desc())
df_transform_inspector_address = df_transform_inspector_address.withColumn("rn", row_number().over(dedup_spec)).filter("rn > 1").drop("rn")


df_tgt_inspector_address = spark.table(f"{target_delta_table}")

df_update_records_inspector_address = df_transform_inspector_address.alias("src").join(df_tgt_inspector_address.alias("tgt"), on="StaffNumber", how="inner").select("src.*").withColumn("SourceSystemID", lit("SapHr")).withColumn("IngestionDate", current_timestamp()).withColumn("ValidFrom", col("StartDate")).withColumn("ValidTo", col("EndDate")).withColumn("IsActive", lit('Y'))

df_new_records_inspector_address = df_transform_inspector_address.alias("src").join(df_tgt_inspector_address.alias("tgt"), on="StaffNumber", how="left_anti").withColumn("SourceSystemID", lit("SapHr")).withColumn("IngestionDate", current_timestamp()).withColumn("ValidFrom", col("StartDate")).withColumn("ValidTo", col("EndDate")).withColumn("IsActive", lit('Y'))

df_merged_records_inspector_address = df_new_records_inspector_address.union(df_new_records_inspector_address).dropDuplicates()

#display(df_merged_records_inspector_address)

# Write new records to target Delta Table
#try:
    # Overwrite the entire delta table with transfored dataframe
#    df_merged_records_inspector_address.write.format("delta").mode("overwrite").save(delta_table_path)


#    print(f" Records overwritten successfully to {target_delta_table}")

#except Exception as e:
#    print(f" Error writing to {target_delta_table}: {str(e)}")
#    raise

# Write new records to target Delta Table
try:
    # Overwrite the entire delta table with transfored dataframe
    df_merged_records_inspector_address.write.format("delta").mode("overwrite").save(delta_table_path)


    print(f" Records overwritten successfully to {target_delta_table}")

except Exception as e:
    print(f" Error writing to {target_delta_table}: {str(e)}")
    raise



# Write new records to target Delta Table
try:
    target_sap_hr_weekly_df.write.format("delta").mode("overwrite").save(delta_table_path)

    # Append new records into odw_harmonised_db.inspector_address
    df_new_records_inspector_address.write.format("delta").mode("append").saveAsTable("odw_harmonised_db.inspector_address")

    print(f" Data successfully written to {target_delta_table}")

except Exception as e:
    print(f" Error writing to {target_delta_table}: {str(e)}")
    raise


display(df_transform_inspector_address)

# Write data to target Delta Table
#try:
#    target_sap_hr_weekly_df.write.format("delta").mode("overwrite").save(delta_table_path)

    # Ensure the table exists
#    spark.sql(f"CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {target_delta_table} USING DELTA LOCATION '{delta_table_path}'")

#    print(f" Data successfully written to {target_delta_table}")

#except Exception as e:
#    print(f" Error writing to {target_delta_table}: {str(e)}")
#    raise

# Step 1: Import Required Libraries
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
from pyspark.sql.functions import col, lit, current_timestamp

# Step 3: Define Source and Target Table Names
SOURCE_TABLE = "sap_hr.inspector_address"
FINAL_TABLE = "sap_hr.inspector_address"

# Step 4: Load Source Data (Staging Table)
df_source = spark.read.table(SOURCE_TABLE)

# Step 5: Clean Column Names (Remove Special Characters & Spaces)
def clean_column_names(df):
    return df.toDF(*[col.replace(" ", "_").replace(".", "_") for col in df.columns])

df_source = clean_column_names(df_source)

# Step 6: Data Transformation - Handle "Charting Officer" Formatting
df_transformed = df_source.withColumn(
    "Charting_Officer",
    col("Charting_Officer").when(col("Charting_Officer").like("50%"), col("Charting_Officer").substr(1, 8)) \
                    .when(col("Charting_Officer").like("42%"), col("Charting_Officer").substr(1, 8)) \
                    .otherwise(col("Charting_Officer"))
)

# Step 7: Remove Null or Empty "Charting Officer for Inspector" Values
df_transformed = df_transformed.withColumn("Charting_Officer_for_Inspector",col("Charting_Officer_for_Inspector").when(col("Charting_Officer_for_Inspector") == "", lit(None))                                        )

# Step 8: Keep Only Latest Start Date Per Staff Number
df_transformed.createOrReplaceTempView("temp_staging_view")
df_latest = spark.sql("""
    SELECT * FROM (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY [Staff Number] ORDER BY [Start Date] DESC) AS rn
                    FROM temp_staging_view
                    ) WHERE rn = 1""").drop("rn")

# Step 9: Add Hash Key for Deduplication
df_latest = df_latest.withColumn("ValHashKey", 
    expr("hash(Staff_Number, Street_and_House_Number, City, District, Postal_Code, Start_Date, End_Date, Charting_Officer, Telephone_no)")
)

# Step 10: Add Validity Tracking Columns
df_latest = df_latest.withColumn("Valid_From", col("Start_Date")) \
                    .withColumn("Valid_To", lit("9999-12-31")) \
                    .withColumn("Current", lit(1)) \
                    .withColumn("Last_Updated", current_timestamp())

# Step 11: Create a Temporary View for SQL Operations
df_latest.createOrReplaceTempView("df_latest_view")

# Step 12: Perform Upsert Using MERGE INTO
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO {FINAL_TABLE} AS final
    USING df_latest_view AS source
    ON final.[Staff Number] = source.[Staff Number]

    WHEN MATCHED THEN 
    UPDATE SET 
        final.[Street and House Number] = source.[Street_and_House_Number],
        final.[2nd Address Line] = source.[2nd_Address_Line],
        final.[City] = source.[City],
        final.[District] = source.[District],
        final.[Postal Code] = source.[Postal_Code],
        final.[Region] = source.[Region],
        final.[Start Date] = source.[Start_Date],
        final.[End Date] = source.[End_Date],
        final.[Charting Officer] = source.[Charting_Officer],
        final.[Charting Officer for Inspector] = source.[Charting_Officer_for_Inspector],
        final.[Subs PS group] = source.[Subs_PS_group],
        final.[Telephone no] = source.[Telephone_no],
        final.[Personal Mobile] = source.[Personal_Mobile],
        final.[Work Mobile] = source.[Work_Mobile],
        final.[Chngd on] = source.[Chngd_on],
        final.[Valid From] = source.[Start_Date],
        final.[Valid To] = '9999-12-31',
        final.[Current] = 1,
        final.[ValHashKey] = source.[ValHashKey],
        final.[Last Updated] = current_timestamp()

    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
    INSERT (
        [Staff Number], [Street and House Number], [2nd Address Line], [City], [District], 
        [Postal Code], [Region], [Start Date], [End Date], [Charting Officer], 
        [Charting Officer for Inspector], [Subs PS group], [Telephone no], 
        [Personal Mobile], [Work Mobile], [Chngd on], [Valid From], [Valid To], 
        [Current], [ValHashKey], [Last Updated]
    )
    VALUES (
        source.[Staff Number], source.[Street_and_House_Number], source.[2nd_Address_Line], 
        source.[City], source.[District], source.[Postal_Code], source.[Region], 
        source.[Start_Date], source.[End_Date], source.[Charting_Officer], 
        source.[Charting_Officer_for_Inspector], source.[Subs_PS_group], source.[Telephone_no], 
        source.[Personal_Mobile], source.[Work_Mobile], source.[Chngd_on], 
        source.[Start_Date], '9999-12-31', 1, source.[ValHashKey], current_timestamp()
    )
""")

print(" Upsert operation completed successfully!")
